prestazioni: AMR-tuned 4.0L twin-turbocharged V8 (M177 DE 40 AL) with Mansory Stage 3+ ECU remap (950hp/1,050Nm via upgraded fuel system: 102mm billet throttle bodies, Bosch Motorsport 2,000cc injectors, and high-flow fuel pumps), paired with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger upgrade (76mm billet compressor wheel, 106mm turbine) and custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipes with secondary catalytic converters deleted

Mansory Carbon-Titanium hybrid exhaust system (dual 3.5-inch Inconel 625 headers, Akrapovič titanium mufflers, and electronically controlled bypass valves) with a 12dB active sound tuning module for track/race modes

Full Ohlins TTX46 3-way adjustable coilover suspension with Mansory-specific valving (24-position rebound, 22-position compression, and 12-position high/low-speed compression damping), paired with a custom carbon-fiber front strut brace (Mansory CFRP, 3K twill weave) and rear subframe reinforcement plates (Aerospace-grade 7075-T6 aluminum)
estetica: Mansory 'White Gold' widebody kit (front fenders extended by 50mm, rear quarter panels by 65mm) with integrated carbon-fiber canards (3D-printed air guides for 15% downforce increase at 180mph) and a full carbon-fiber front splitter with active Gurney flap (adjustable via cabin switch)

Custom Mansory 'Black Diamond' forged aluminum wheels (23x11.5 ET35 front, 23x12.5 ET40 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (325/25R23 front, 355/20R23 rear) with Mansory-branded center caps (titanium, laser-etched Aston Martin wings)

Full Mansory 'Stealth' carbon-fiber aero package (roof, hood, trunk lid, and side skirts in matte clear-coated 2x2 twill weave) with a rear diffuser featuring integrated LED brake cooling ducts (active airflow management via ECU-linked fans) and a 1,200mm rear wing (adjustable angle of attack: 5°-25°) with dual carbon-fiber support struts
